recentTweets.text:
I'm excited to have received the endorsement of perhaps the most prominent small business advocate in the United States. 

Vote Chuck Edwards for Congress. #NC11

ANNOUNCEMENT: My complete focus is on the needs of Western North Carolinians after Hurricane Helene. I have and will be boots on the ground volunteering, evaluating storm damage, and working with local officials to get the supplies the people of NC-11 desperately need.

That will https://t.co/U0Dst0tHq7
Please continue to keep WNC in your thoughts and prayers following the aftermath of Hurricane Helene. Please see the thread below for emergency contacts ⬇️

Ron DeSantis visits Linville, NC in the shadows of Grandfather Mountain as headliner for @markrobinsonNC, who has a clear vision - plus a plan - to improve our state’s economy, fix our education system, and provide opportunities for today’s youth. #NC11 #ncpol https://t.co/nVKhvSdAP9
Vote Chuck Edwards for Congress November 5th to fix how Washington works. #ncpol https://t.co/S1zAgKgUZW
NC-11 Republicans showed up in full force at this weekend’s spirited @NCGOP annual convention. #ncpol https://t.co/EHUQ2TO5ct

WNC families are paying $991 more a month for the same goods and services as in January 2021 due to inflation.

Imagine if you could spend that $991 on a family vacation or put it into savings?
Wishing all a blessed and Happy Easter. https://t.co/3bq9X6MLTq
Electricity is UP 28.6%, food is UP 20.9%, the buying power of the dollar is DOWN. There’s no doubt American families are worse off under Bidenomics. #ncpol
Reminder to vote! Tomorrow is Super Tuesday and I’d love your support at the ballot box. #NC11 https://t.co/ZVJpnKBZbK
I wish you peace, joy, and the true spirit of Christmas. #NC11 https://t.co/3dVQ2nYVDP
It’s invigorating to see business persons cheer for business persons. Especially when they erect a billboard in support. Thank you, NC and U.S. businesses. #NC11 https://t.co/TSXBR6K5aH

I’ve been honored to work to restore our nation’s fiscal sanity, protect our freedoms, hold the Biden Administration accountable, and enable Americans to succeed. But I can't turn back now. That’s why today, I filed to run to represent NC-11 in a second term. https://t.co/CZIzWnif8b

I took a break from posting so I could get to work serving you in DC, here’s what I’ve done since January: 

✅ Introduced 11 bills

✅ Returned over $2M in benefits to #NC11

✅ Held nearly 200 mobile office visits

✅ Helped over 1,300 citizens with the federal government

With more of the same inflationary spending, the President's budget makes it clear he is not concerned with your problems. Not the cost of your gas and groceries, not the safety of your family, not your livelihood, and not your freedom.
https://t.co/iX0woxvWBT https://t.co/qonVjGZlUy

My office is empty now & I find it bittersweet. Thank you for the opportunity to serve you in the NC Senate these past 6 years. I can’t wait to get started fighting for WNC in Congress on Tuesday. #NC11 #NCGA https://t.co/8ElteChFGi
My staff and I are eager to get to work serving the citizens of #NC11 at our District Office in Hendersonville, NC. https://t.co/Dpioc0Cied
I enjoyed taking a step back and spending Christmas with family yesterday. I hope you all had a very Merry Christmas! 🎄 #NC11

As temperatures plummet across the mountains, let’s embrace our mountain values of looking after one another. 

Please check on your neighbors & be courteous on the roads. Let’s come together so we can all make it home safely to enjoy the holidays with our families. #NC11

This year’s friendly Salvation Army of Hendersonville bell ringing contest between the Rotary & Kiwanis clubs goes to the Kiwanians. And yes, it was difficult for me to admit.

Thanks to all who came out to support the Salvation Army, I had a blast spreading holiday cheer! #NC11 https://t.co/N126nN6tjm

Today is one of the most beautiful days of the year, when the nation bands together to honor fallen veterans with wreaths for the holidays. May their sacrifices never be forgotten. #WreathsAcrossAmerica #NC11 https://t.co/2VoI8wg4sb

Every day, the US uses 4.85 million more barrels of oil than it produces. US energy production can’t keep up with energy consumption, yet Biden thinks the solution is to drain our reserves when he should be increasing production. #NC11

30 North Carolina law enforcement officers have been injured or killed in the line of duty this year. That’s 30 friends, 30 loved ones, and 30 heroes. 

Biden’s crime crisis is hurting NC families. Enough is enough. #NC11

As winter arrives across NC-11, President Biden’s war on American energy is leaving mountain families out in the cold. It’s time we challenge Biden’s hostility to our domestic energy production and unleash American energy! #NC11

WNC had an extra special presence tonight in DC! Led by 9 yr old Catcuce “Coche” Micco Tiger of the Eastern Band of Cherokee Indians; Coche was selected as this years tree lighter. He lit the tree with pride & showcased our District’s thriving tribal culture. #NC11 https://t.co/rDluiouXG4

I may be a bit biased, but I think they made the perfect selection for this years Capitol Christmas Tree.

This #NC11 tree hails from the Pisgah National Forest & will serve as a proud reminder of the beautiful district I serve each time I enter the Capitol this holiday season. https://t.co/CevAYZ7g6Z
Pumping oil in Venezuela is not achieving American energy independence. America First!

Thanksgiving is a time to stop & reflect on the blessings we have, and this year I have a lot to be thankful for. I’m wishing you all the best this Thanksgiving. May God bless & protect you, your family, and all whom you hold dear. #NC11 https://t.co/06EAeqyUaw

My Raleigh office stands ready to help those who can not get a returned call. 

If you or someone you know has a federal issue but can’t get in contact with their federal office, please contact my Raleigh office at (919) 733-5745, or via email at Chuck.Edwards@ncleg.gov. #NC11

I'm excited to announce our chief of staff will be Bronwyn Lance, the first woman named to this important position serving #NC11. I'm thrilled she is our team quarterback. The people of NC11 will benefit greatly from her deep skill set. See full statement: https://t.co/5EqLRrg5y2

I’m humbled to be among the new members of the 118th Congress this week for the first of two weeks of orientation. We’re anxiously awaiting to know the size of the Republican majority. #NC11 https://t.co/UBLgQ1YAxg

Thank you, western North Carolina. I remain honored & humbled to have been given this opportunity to serve and fight for the people of #NC11 in DC. I promise to work hard every day to be the representative you deserve. https://t.co/rWm1QsT7HW

I’m grateful for the strong showing of support. We have a lot of work to do for the people of WNC.

I built my career in business by always putting customers first & will put constituents first in DC. I am proud to be WNC’s Congressman-Elect. Now it’s time to get to work. #NC11
The @NCFaithFreedom Coalition clearly spells out the differences in this congressional race. Be sure to take this voter guide to the poll with you on Tuesday if you support faith and freedom! #NC11
It was an honor to speak alongside my friend and US Senate candidate, Ted Budd today, as WNC made it loud and clear they are ready for change in DC! #NC11 https://t.co/PBxtjJIcs3

On Thursday, I had the pleasure of meeting with the Concerned Citizens of Haywood County! They asked some tough questions, but through it all I reassured them of my dedication to fighting for the people of WNC. I will never leave these mountains behind. #NC11 https://t.co/Su8htr5lcy

Violence of any kind against anyone, even elected officials or a member of their family simply cannot be tolerated in our great country. The attacker of Paul Pelosi should be prosecuted to the full extent the law will allow.

Mountain families can't take it anymore & if elected to Congress, neither will I.

This basic meal now costs 35% more than in 2020. Yet, my opponent is doing all she can to avoid facing the hardship Biden's policies have placed on those struggling to put food on the table. #NC11 https://t.co/966ZMarPLj

NC-11 has many cultures & today I enjoyed my intro to Diwali, India's biggest & most important holiday. I was especially heartened that these young Indian-American patriots kicked off the celebration w/ the National Anthem. Thank you, Pratik Bhakta for the generous invite! #NC11 https://t.co/Fu6fFXa4wV

Hey, #NC11, it’s officially the 2nd day of Early Voting! 

The polls are open and voters are excited for the #RedWave that is coming! #wncpol #ncpol #EarlyVote

Time & time again, western North Carolinians have asked me how Biden sent our economy into a dangerous tailspin… my answer:

He spent trillions of your tax dollars, while cutting off American energy & stifling our economy. He’s destroyed our economy - it’s time we fix it. #NC11

Small businesses are drowning in Biden’s crumbling economy. They deserve a representative who understands and will fight for them in Congress. As a small business owner myself, I understand, and I will fight! #NC11 #wncpol #ncpol
There’s nothing quite like family time. https://t.co/kvYpJMeEKu

PARENTS KNOW BEST. 

That’s why I’ve diligently fought to help secure unprecedented funding for school choice since entering the NC Senate in 2016. 

Parents should be able to decide how and where their children receives their education, regardless of wealth or ZIP code. #NC11 https://t.co/iQghPdMDeE

I’ve spent the last 6 years prioritizing NC’s small business climate and working to reduce the tax strain on citizens. This year, that work has paid off & NC has been ranked the #1 state for business and #1 for Economy by @CNBC. #ncpol #wncpol #NCGA https://t.co/F2uHpJF9Q8
From the first session to the last, it was an honor. #NCGA #ncpol #wncpol https://t.co/e3j6oTax9g

It’s Melon Day at the Capitol! Every year @SenBrentJackson brings a trailer full of his NC grown melons for everyone to enjoy.

I can never pass on the chance to eat delicious local produce so I got a melon. Small farmers like Brent are why I will always support NC’s Ag industry! https://t.co/fEKzA1paiv

With only 2 days left in the short session & my time in Raleigh coming to a close, I value time spent with my fellow members. 

Last night, many of us met at the NC Fairgrounds for a cookout! It’s bittersweet this chapter is coming to a close, but I’m excited for the next. #NCGA https://t.co/3tuX6mBHrV

What a great event connecting with friends here in Raleigh! 

Special thank you to @SenatorBerger & @NCHouseSpeaker for your support on my trail to DC. #NC11 #wncpol #ncpol https://t.co/6bPslfCsLy

Thank you to everyone who showed up for the volunteer training this weekend across WNC! The turnout made me even more excited and confident for the red wave we are going to have in November. #NC11 #wncpol #ncpol https://t.co/xsnZBKynYn

SCOTUS agrees prayer is acceptable. Christian Conservatives are on the cusp of taking back our country.

Supreme Court sides with high school coach who led prayer on football field https://t.co/QETHllgXSg

I have always been pro-life. 

I’m pro-life today and I’ll be pro-life tomorrow. The Supreme Court has now decided that this is a state issue, and I will keep working with the North Carolina legislature to ensure that life is protected in our great state. #NC11 #wncpol #RoeVsWade

It’s Flag Day! In 1777, the United States approved the beautiful Stars and Stripes for the first national flag. Over 2 centuries later and I am so proud of the symbol this flag holds and the country we have built. #NC11 #wncpol #ncpol https://t.co/NaUUVVz6et
In Congress, I will work tirelessly on important issues plaguing our mountains and our country such as inflation, the border crisis, and keeping communities safe. #NC11 #wncpol #ncpol

I was called to run for Congress
because I saw a need to bring the successful policies I fought for in the NC Senate to DC. I have been lucky to call WNC my home for so long & I want to fight for the people of these mountains in Congress. #NC11 #wncpol #ncpol https://t.co/TPbp9r6xzl

1/2 When I was just 16 yrs old, I started my first job working behind the counter at McDonald's. Here, I developed a passion for serving others a strong work ethic. With that work ethic & some dedication, I went on to purchase the very same McDonald's years later!

When I entered the business world, I saw first-hand the impact government plays in our lives. I felt called to make a change & help other mountain folk like me, so I got involved in local politics & eventually ran for the NC Senate. 6 yrs later & now I’m taking the fight to DC! https://t.co/pxZ3C4P6Wg

I feel extremely lucky to have been born in Haywood County, raised in Henderson County, and to get to experience all of the beauty that Western NC has to offer. As a native of WNC, I strive to create policies and tackle issues that affect mountain folks. #NC11 #wncpol #ncpol https://t.co/PJbpwVQGnl

We must secure the Southern Border. In Raleigh, I worked diligently to keep violent illegal aliens and dangerous drug cartels out of our state. Next step: Requiring ALL law enforcement to cooperate with ICE in order to keep our communities safe. #NC11 #wncpol #ncpol

I enjoyed speaking w/ the Henderson County GOP tonight, whose members are deeply concerned about the lawless state of our Southern Border & rising inflation at the pump. In DC, I plan to tackle these critical issues head-on, just like I did in the NC General Assembly #NC11 https://t.co/TDFGAV6uT0

kurdistanMentions.text: Every day, the US uses 4.85 million more barrels of oil than it produces. US energy production can’t keep up with energy consumption, yet Biden thinks the solution is to drain our reserves when he should be increasing production. #NC11

As winter arrives across NC-11, President Biden’s war on American energy is leaving mountain families out in the cold. It’s time we challenge Biden’s hostility to our domestic energy production and unleash American energy! #NC11
Pumping oil in Venezuela is not achieving American energy independence. America First!

Time & time again, western North Carolinians have asked me how Biden sent our economy into a dangerous tailspin… my answer:

He spent trillions of your tax dollars, while cutting off American energy & stifling our economy. He’s destroyed our economy - it’s time we fix it. #NC11

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 4 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Chuck Edwards. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 4 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2022-12-06T13:07:00Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
assessment.dominantFrame: Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language

When I entered the business world, I saw first-hand the impact government plays in our lives. I felt called to make a change & help other mountain folk like me, so I got involved in local politics & eventually ran for the NC Senate. 6 yrs later & now I’m taking the fight to DC! https://t.co/pxZ3C4P6Wg

I enjoyed speaking w/ the Henderson County GOP tonight, whose members are deeply concerned about the lawless state of our Southern Border & rising inflation at the pump. In DC, I plan to tackle these critical issues head-on, just like I did in the NC General Assembly #NC11 https://t.co/TDFGAV6uT0

In the NC Senate, I co-chair our Commerce Committee, where we’re tackling Biden’s inflation crisis because NC families can’t afford rising prices. In DC, we’ll bring the same WNC solutions to the U.S. House - the place that needs our answers for curbing inflation the most #NC11 https://t.co/TBpxPopkmN

Today, we honor all of the brave members of our US Military, who gave their lives in the greatest sacrifice to keep us safe and protect our great country and freedoms. God bless you and your families. #NC11 #wncpol #ncpol #MemorialDay https://t.co/HaBEa9ITYw

This weekend, I am thankful for all of America’s veterans, military families, and in particular, our brave servicemembers who gave their lives to defend our freedoms. #ncpol #wncpol #NC11 #MemorialDayWeekend https://t.co/QjrtP6KLCy
